verses.geez:
ወተመየጥነ ፡ ወሖርነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ [ኤ]ርትራ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይቤለኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወዖድናሁ ፡
                  ለደብረ ፡ ሴይር ፡ ብዙኀ ፡ መዋዕለ ።

translations.lxx: And we turned and departed into the wilderness, by the way of the Red Sea, as the Lord spoke to me, and we compassed mount Seir many days.
translations.kjv: Then we turned, and took our journey into the wilderness by the way of the Red sea, as the LORD spake unto me: and we compassed mount Seir many days.

verses.geez: ወይቤለኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to me,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto me, saying,

verses.geez: ኮነክሙ ፡ ዐዊዶቶ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ደብር ፡ ግብኡ ፡ እንከሰ ፡ ልመንገለ ፡ መስዕ ።

translations.lxx: Ye have compassed this mount long enough; turn therefore toward the north.
translations.kjv: Ye have compassed this mountain long enough: turn you northward.

verses.geez:
ወአዝዞሙ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ተሐውሩ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ እንተ ፡ አድዋሊሆሙ ፡ ለአኀዊክሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ዔሳው ፡
                  እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሴይር ፡ ወይፈርሁክሙ ፡ ጥቀ ።

translations.lxx: And charge the people, saying, Ye are going through the borders of your brethren the children of Esau, who dwell in Seir; and they shall fear you, and dread you greatly.
translations.kjv: And command thou the people, saying, Ye are to pass through the coast of your brethren the children of Esau, which dwell in Seir; and they shall be afraid of you: take ye good heed unto yourselves therefore:

verses.geez:
ዑቁ ፡ ኢትትቃተሉ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢእሁበክሙ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ምድሮሙ ፡ ርስተ ፡ ወኢምሥጋረ ፡ እግር ፡ እስመ ፡
                  መክፈልቶ ፡ ወሀብክዎ ፡ ለዔሳው ፡ ደብረ ፡ ሴይር ።

translations.lxx: Do not engage in war against them, for I will not give you of their land even enough to set your foot upon, for I have given mount Seir to the children of Esau as an inheritance.
translations.kjv: Meddle not with them; for I will not give you of their land, no, not so much as a foot breadth; because I have given mount Seir unto Esau for a possession.

verses.geez:
ተሣየጡ ፡ እክለ ፡ በኀቤሆሙ ፡ በወርቅክሙ ፡ ወተሴሰዩ ፡ ወማየኒ ፡ በመስፈርት ፡ ንሥኡ ፡ በኀቤሆሙ ፡ በወርቅክሙ ፡
                  ወስተዩ ።

translations.lxx: Buy food of them for money and eat, and ye shall receive water of them by measure for money, and drink.
translations.kjv: Ye shall buy meat of them for money, that ye may eat; and ye shall also buy water of them for money, that ye may drink.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ባረከከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ግብረ ፡ እደዊከ ፤ አእምር ፡ እፎ ፡ ዐደውካሁ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡
                  ገዳም ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ዘግሩም ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ናሁ ፡ አርብዓ ፡ ዓመ ፡ ሀለወ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክከ ፡ እንዘ ፡ አልቦ
                  ፡ ዘያኀጥአከ ፡ እምዘ ፡ ነበብከ ።

translations.lxx: For the Lord our God has blessed thee in every work of thy hands. Consider how thou wentest through that great and terrible wilderness: behold, the Lord thy God has been with thee forty years; thou didst not lack any thing.
translations.kjv: For the LORD thy God hath blessed thee in all the works of thy hand: he knoweth thy walking through this great wilderness: these forty years the LORD thy God hath been with thee; thou hast lacked nothing.

verses.geez:
ወተዐደውናሆሙ ፡ ለአኀዊክሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሴይር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ አራባ ፡ እምነ ፡
                  ኤሎም ፡ ወእምነ ፡ ጋስዮን ፡ ጋቤር ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ተመየጥነ ፡ ወተዐደውነ ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘሞአብ ።

translations.lxx: And we passed by our brethren the children of Esau, who dwelt in Seir, by the way of Araba from Ælon and from Gesion Gaber; and we turned and passed by the way of the desert of Moab.
translations.kjv: And when we passed by from our brethren the children of Esau, which dwelt in Seir, through the way of the plain from Elath, and from Eziongaber, we turned and passed by the way of the wilderness of Moab.

verses.geez:
ወይቤለኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኢትፃረርዎሙ ፡ ለሞአባውያን ፡ ወኢትትቃተሉ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢእሁበክሙ ፡ ርስተ ፡
                  እምነ ፡ ምድሮሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ሎጥ ፡ ወሀብክዎሙ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ ሴይር ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to me, Do not ye quarrel with the Moabites, and do not engage in war with them; for I will not give you of their land for an inheritance, for I have given Aroer to the children of Lot to inherit.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto me, Distress not the Moabites, neither contend with them in battle: for I will not give thee of their land for a possession; because I have given Ar unto the children of Lot for a possession.

verses.geez: ወአሚን ፡ (ወ)ቀደሙ ፡ ነቢረ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ወጽኑዓን ፡ ከመ ፡ እለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አቂም ።

translations.lxx: Formerly the Ommin dwelt in it, a great and numerous nation and powerful, like the Enakim.
translations.kjv: The Emims dwelt therein in times past, a people great, and many, and tall, as the Anakims;

verses.geez: ራፋን ፡ ይከውኑ ፡ እሙንቱኒ ፡ ከመ ፡ እለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አቂም ፡ ወሞአባውያን ፡ ዛሚን ፡ ይብልዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: These also shall be accounted Raphain like the Enakim; and the Moabites call them Ommin.
translations.kjv: Which also were accounted giants, as the Anakims; but the Moabites call them Emims.

verses.geez:
ወኮሬዎስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሴይር ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ቀዲሙ ፡ ወደቂቀ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ አጥፍእዎሙ ፡ ወቀጥቀጥዎሙ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ ፡
                  ወነበሩ ፡ መካኖሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ገበርዋ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለምድረ ፡ ርስቶሙ ፡ እንተ ፡ ወሀቦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the Chorrhite dwelt in Seir before, and the sons of Esau destroyed them, and utterly consumed them from before them; and they dwelt in their place, as Israel did to the land of his inheritance, which the Lord gave to them.
translations.kjv: The Horims also dwelt in Seir beforetime; but the children of Esau succeeded them, when they had destroyed them from before them, and dwelt in their stead; as Israel did unto the land of his possession, which the LORD gave unto them.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ ፡ ተንሥኡ ፡ ወገዐዙ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ወሑሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ ዛሬድ ፡ ወተዐደውናሁ ፡ ለቈላተ ፡ ዛሬ[ድ] ።

translations.lxx: Now then, arise ye, said I, and depart, and cross the valley of Zaret.
translations.kjv: Now rise up, said I, and get you over the brook Zered. And we went over the brook Zered.

verses.geez:
ወመዋዕሊሁ ፡ በዘ ፡ ቦንቱ ፡ [ሖርነ ፡] እምቃዴስ ፡ በርኔ ፡ እስከ ፡ ተዐደውናሁ ፡ ለቈላተ ፡ ዛሬድ ፡ ሠላሳ ፡
                  ወሰመንቱ ፡ ዓመት ፡ እስከ ፡ ሞቱ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ዘይእቲ ፡ ትውልድ ፡ እለ ፡ መስተቃትላን ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ወጠፍኡ ፡
                  እምነ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ በከመ ፡ መሐለ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እግዚእ ።

translations.lxx: And the days in which we travelled from Cades Barne till we crossed the valley of Zaret, were thirty and eight years, until the whole generation of the men of war failed, dying out of the camp, as the Lord God sware to them.
translations.kjv: And the space in which we came from Kadeshbarnea, until we were come over the brook Zered, was thirty and eight years; until all the generation of the men of war were wasted out from among the host, as the LORD sware unto them.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ እደ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ሀለወት ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ታጥፍኦሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ እስከ ፡ ወድቁ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And the hand of the Lord was upon them to destroy them out of the midst of the camp, until they were consumed.
translations.kjv: For indeed the hand of the LORD was against them, to destroy them from among the host, until they were consumed.

verses.geez: ወኮነ ፡ እምዘ ፡ ወድቁ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ውእቶሙ ፡ ዕደው ፡ መስተቃትላን ፡ ወሞቱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ሕዝብ ፤

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when all the men of war dying out of the midst of the people had fallen,
translations.kjv: So it came to pass, when all the men of war were consumed and dead from among the people,

verses.geez: ወነበበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: that the Lord spoke to me, saying,
translations.kjv: That the LORD spake unto me, saying,

verses.geez: ናሁ ፡ ተሐውር ፡ አንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አድዋለ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ ዘሴይር ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt pass over this day the borders of Moab to Aroer;
translations.kjv: Thou art to pass over through Ar, the coast of Moab, this day:

verses.geez:
ወትበጽሑ ፡ ቅሩቦሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ዐማን ፡ ኢትፃረርዎሙ ፡ ወኢትትኣኀዙ ፡ ቀትለ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢእሁበክሙ ፡
                  እምነ ፡ ምድሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ አማን ፡ ርስተ ፡ እስመ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ሎጥ ፡ ወሀብክዎሙ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ይእቲ ።

translations.lxx: and ye shall draw nigh to the children of Amman: do not quarrel with them, nor wage war with them; for I will not give thee of the land of the children of Amman for an inheritance, because I have given it to the children of Lot for an inheritance.
translations.kjv: And when thou comest nigh over against the children of Ammon, distress them not, nor meddle with them: for I will not give thee of the land of the children of Ammon any possession; because I have given it unto the children of Lot for a possession.

verses.geez: ወረፋይን ፡ ትት[ኌ]ለቍ ፡ እስመ ፡ ረፋይን ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ቀዲሙ ፡ ወዐማናውያንሰ ፡ ዞሜን ፡ ይብልዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: It shall be accounted a land of Raphain, for the Raphain dwelt there before, and the Ammanites call them Zochommin.
translations.kjv: (That also was accounted a land of giants: giants dwelt therein in old time; and the Ammonites call them Zamzummims;

verses.geez:
ሕዝብ ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ወብዙኅ ፡ ወጽኑዓን ፡ ወኀያላን ፡ ከመ ፡ እለ ፡ አቂም ፡ ወአጥፍኦሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እምቅድመ ፡
                  ገጾሙ ፡ ወተወረስዎሙ ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ህየንቴሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: A great nation and populous, and mightier than you, as also the Enakim: yet the Lord destroyed them from before them, and they inherited their land, and they dwelt there instead of them until this day.
translations.kjv: A people great, and many, and tall, as the Anakims; but the LORD destroyed them before them; and they succeeded them, and dwelt in their stead:

verses.geez:
ከመ ፡ ገብሩ ፡ (ለ)ደቂቀ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሴይር ፡ በከመ ፡ አስዐሮሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ለኮራውያን ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ ፡ ወተወረስዎሙ ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ህየንቴሆሙ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዛቲ ።

translations.lxx: As they did to the children of Esau that dwell in Seir, even as they destroyed the Chorrhite from before them, and inherited their country, and dwelt therein instead of them until this day.
translations.kjv: As he did to the children of Esau, which dwelt in Seir, when he destroyed the Horims from before them; and they succeeded them, and dwelt in their stead even unto this day:

verses.geez:
ወሔዋውያንኒ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሴሮት ፡ እስከ ፡ ጋዜስ ፡ ወቀጰዶቅያ ፡ (ወ)አጥፍእዎሙ ፡ ወነበሩ ፡
                  ህየንቴሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the Evites who dwell in Asedoth to Gaza, and the Cappadocians who came out of Cappadocia, destroyed them, and dwelt in their room.
translations.kjv: And the Avims which dwelt in Hazerim, even unto Azzah, the Caphtorims, which came forth out of Caphtor, destroyed them, and dwelt in their stead.)

verses.geez:
ወይእዜኒ ፡ ተንሥኡ ፡ ወገዐዙ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ወተዐደውዎ ፡ ለቈላተ ፡ አርኖን ፡ ናሁ ፡ አግባእክዎ ፡ [ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ፡]
                  ለሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ሔሴቦን ፡ [አሞርያዊ ፡] ወለምድሩ ፡ ወምልካ ፡ ወተዋረሳ ፡ ወአኀዞሙ ፡ ወተቃተሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: Now then arise and depart, and pass over the valley of Arnon: behold, I have delivered into thy hands Seon the king of Esebon the Amorite, and his land: begin to inherit it: engage in war with him this day.
translations.kjv: Rise ye up, take your journey, and pass over the river Arnon: behold, I have given into thine hand Sihon the Amorite, king of Heshbon, and his land: begin to possess it, and contend with him in battle.

verses.geez:
ወበዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ [አቅድም ፡] አምጽኦ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ እለ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ መትሕተ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ይፍርሁከ ፡ ወይርዐዱ ፡ እምኔከ ፡ ወይደንግፁ ፡ እምከመ ፡ ሰምዑ ፡ ስመከ ፡ ወትእኅዞሙ ፡ ፍርሀት ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጽከ ።

translations.lxx: Begin to put thy terror and thy fear on the face of all the nations under heaven, who shall be troubled when they have heard thy name, and shall be in anguish before thee.
translations.kjv: This day will I begin to put the dread of thee and the fear of thee upon the nations that are under the whole heaven, who shall hear report of thee, and shall tremble, and be in anguish because of thee.

verses.geez:
ወፈነውከ ፡ ተናብልተ ፡ እምነ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘ[ቄ]ድሞት ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ሔሴቦን ፡ በቃለ ፡ ሰላም ፡ እንዘ ፡
                  ትብል ፤

translations.lxx: And I sent ambassadors from the wilderness of Kedamoth to Seon king of Esebon with peaceable words, saying,
translations.kjv: And I sent messengers out of the wilderness of Kedemoth unto Sihon king of Heshbon with words of peace, saying,

verses.geez: እኅልፍአ ፡ እንተአ ፡ ምድርከ ፡ ወፍኖተ ፡ አሐውር ፡ ኢእትገሐስ ፡ ኢለየማን ፡ ወኢለፀጋም ።

translations.lxx: I will pass through thy land: I will go by the road, I will not turn aside to the right hand or to the left.
translations.kjv: Let me pass through thy land: I will go along by the high way, I will neither turn unto the right hand nor to the left.

verses.geez:
እክለኒ ፡ በወርቅየ ፡ ትሁበኒ ፡ ወእሴሰይ ፡ ወማየኒ ፡ በወርቅየ ፡ ትሁበኒ ፡ ወእሰቲ ፡ ወዳእሙ ፡ እኅልፍ ፡ በእግርየ
                  ፤

translations.lxx: Thou shalt give me food for money, and I will eat; and thou shalt give me water for money, and I will drink; I will only go through on my feet:
translations.kjv: Thou shalt sell me meat for money, that I may eat; and give me water for money, that I may drink: only I will pass through on my feet;

verses.geez:
በከመ ፡ ገብሩ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዔሳው ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሴይር ፡ ወሞኣባውያንኒ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ
                  ፡ አሮየር ፡ እስከ ፡ ተዐደውክዎ ፡ ለዮርዳንስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ወሀበነአ ፡ እግዚአብሔርአ ፡ አምላክነአ ።

translations.lxx: as the sons of Esau did to me, who dwelt in Seir, and the Moabites who dwelt in Aroer, until I shall have passed Jordan into the land which the Lord our God gives us.
translations.kjv: (As the children of Esau which dwell in Seir, and the Moabites which dwell in Ar, did unto me;) until I shall pass over Jordan into the land which the LORD our God giveth us.

verses.geez:
ወአበየ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ሔሴቦን ፡ አኅልፎተነ ፡ እንተ ፡ ኀቤሁ ፡ እስመ ፡ አጽንዐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ ፡
                  መንፈሶ ፡ ወአእከዮ ፡ በልቡ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይግባእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴነ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: And Seon king of Esebon would not that we should pass by him, because the Lord our God hardened his spirit, and made his heart stubborn, that he might be delivered into thy hands, as on this day.
translations.kjv: But Sihon king of Heshbon would not let us pass by him: for the LORD thy God hardened his spirit, and made his heart obstinate, that he might deliver him into thy hand, as appeareth this day.

verses.geez:
ወይቤለኒ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ናሁ ፡ አኀዝኩ ፡ አግብኦ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ ገጽከ ፡ ለሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ሔሴቦን
                  ፡ አሞርያዊ ፡ ወምድሮሂ ፡ ወአኀዝ ፡ ተወረሳ ፡ ምድሮ ፡ ርስተ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to me, Behold, I have begun to deliver before thee Seon the king of Esebon the Amorite, and his land, and do thou begin to inherit his land.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto me, Behold, I have begun to give Sihon and his land before thee: begin to possess, that thou mayest inherit his land.

verses.geez: ወወፅአ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ወተቀበለነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ሕዝቡ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትቃተለነ ፡ በኤያስ ።

translations.lxx: And Seon the king of Esebon came forth to meet us, he and all his people to war at Jassa.
translations.kjv: Then Sihon came out against us, he and all his people, to fight at Jahaz.

verses.geez: ወአግብኦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደዊነ ፡ ወቀተልናሁ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ደቂቁ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ሕዝቡ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord our God delivered him before our face, and we smote him, and his sons, and all his people.
translations.kjv: And the LORD our God delivered him before us; and we smote him, and his sons, and all his people.

verses.geez:
ወነሣእነ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ አህጉሪሁ ፡ በውእቶን ፡ መዋዕል ፡ ወአጥፋእናሆን ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ አህጉሪሁ ፡ ወአንስቲያሆሙኒ ፡ ወደቂቆሙኒ
                  ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ዘአትረፍነ ፡ ነፋጺተ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And we took possession of all his cities at that time, and we utterly destroyed every city in succession, and their wives, and their children; we left no living prey.
translations.kjv: And we took all his cities at that time, and utterly destroyed the men, and the women, and the little ones, of every city, we left none to remain:

verses.geez: ዘእንበለ ፡ እንስሳሆሙ ፡ ዘማህረክነ ፡ ለነ ፡ ወበርበርነ ፡ አህጉሮሙ ፡ ዘነሣእነ ፤

translations.lxx: Only we took the cattle captive, and took the spoil of the cities.
translations.kjv: Only the cattle we took for a prey unto ourselves, and the spoil of the cities which we took.

verses.geez:
እምነ ፡ አሮኤር ፡ እንተ ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ አርኖን ፡ ወሀገረኒ ፡ እንተ ፡ ሀለወት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቈላት ፡ እስከ ፡
                  ደብረ ፡ ገላአድ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ እንተ ፡ አምሰጠተነ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ አግብአ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክነ
                  ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደዊነ ።

translations.lxx: From Aroer, which is by the brink of the brook of Arnon, and the city which is in the valley, and as far as the mount of Galaad; there was not a city which escaped us: the Lord our God delivered all of them into our hands.
translations.kjv: From Aroer, which is by the brink of the river of Arnon, and from the city that is by the river, even unto Gilead, there was not one city too strong for us: the LORD our God delivered all unto us:

verses.geez:
ዘእንበለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዐሞን ፡ ዘኢበጻሕነ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ፈለገ ፡ ያቦቅ ፡ ወአህጉ[ረ] ፡
                  ዘውስተ ፡ ቴርኔ ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዘነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኤምላክነ ።

translations.lxx: Only we did not draw near to the children of Amman, even all the parts bordering on the brook Jaboc, and the cities in the mountain country, as the Lord our God charged us.
translations.kjv: Only unto the land of the children of Ammon thou camest not, nor unto any place of the river Jabbok, nor unto the cities in the mountains, nor unto whatsoever the LORD our God forbad us.
